description: Returns a list of battles optionally filtered by active status and country.

isActive.description: Filter by active or inactive battles.

limit.description: Maximum number of battles to return.

countryId.description: Filter battles involving a specific country as attacker or defender.

fields.items: array — list of battle summary objects, each with _id and associated metadata

notes: Each item in the items array is a battle summary with at minimum _id, isActive, and participant metadata. Use battle.getById for full detail on a specific battle.
